Motion To Impose Terminating Sanctions; Declaration Of John H. Aspelin; And Memo Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John H. Aspelin, Esq. of Aspelin & Bridgman LLP, Tel. 415.296.9812, appearing for defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ROMEO L. AGLORO, JR.'s Motion To Impose Terminating Sanctions - No opposition filed. Motion for an order imposing terminating sanctions granted. Plaintiff shall pay sanctions of $1,000 to Defendant Romeo Agloro, Jr. within thirty days of notice of this order. Order signed. Pro Tem Judge: Mark Schreiber; Not reported
